title: lagenophora solenogyne
intro: Lagenophora solenogyne, also known as the Flax-leaved Paper Daisy or Flax-leaved Wire Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lagenophora solenogyne include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
